name: CatbunGithub
short: Automatically creates GitHub Issues from Discord bug reports and feature requests.
description: Watches designated channels and responds to !bug / !feature commands to create GitHub Issues automatically. Supports source tagging (discord vs in-game), Discord CDN screenshot attachments, and posts the issue URL back to the reporter. Fully configurable per-server via Red Bot's Config system — no hardcoded values.
end_user_data_statement: This cog includes Discord usernames and user IDs in the body of GitHub Issues for attribution. No data is stored locally by the cog.
author: Lone Pixel Studios
install_msg:
CatbunGithub loaded!

Configure with:
  [p]cbgithub setrepo owner/repo
  [p]cbgithub settoken YOUR_GITHUB_TOKEN
  [p]cbgithub addbugchannel #channel
  [p]cbgithub addfeaturechannel #channel
  [p]cbgithub addtriagechannel #channel
  [p]cbgithub setlogchannel #channel
  [p]cbgithub settings
